situational_context: Running comeback week 6: 9 runs completed since May 3 (Run #9 today: 5.79 km, FC 142, suffer 34). 5 km plateau consolidated (3 consecutive runs at 5+ km). ACWR elevated at 1.36 — above 1.3 safety cap, requiring load reduction this week. HRV sustained LOW (7d avg 34, down 15% from May baseline of 40). Body battery depleted (49). However, VO2max running improved to 40.4 (+2.1 vs May), indicating positive adaptation despite recovery strain. Training status: Functional Overreaching. Weight declining steadily: 102.6 kg (-1.5 kg since May). Primary daily modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day on sur-site days). Weekend plan reduced (gravel 45 min Z1, Run #10 4.5 km) to allow chronic load to catch up. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Reduce training load to correct ACWR from 1.36 to ≤1.30 — Saturday gravel reduced to 45 min Z1 (ebike preferred), Sunday Run #10 reduced to 4.5 km with strict HR ≤135. No distance progression until ACWR normalizes.
Monitor HRV recovery — 7d avg declined 15% from May baseline (40 → 34, sustained LOW). If HRV 7d avg doesn't recover toward ≥36 within one week, reduce to 1 run/week.
Increase daily protein to ≥150g — current 7d avg is 127g, 15% below target needed for tendon remodeling. Add protein source to breakfast.

markers_to_watch.reason: Above safety cap — elevated injury risk during running comeback at 102.6 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: Recovery target ≥36 within 7 days (currently 34, baseline was 40)
markers_to_watch.reason: Sustained LOW for 7+ days. Normal RHR + improving VO2max suggests functional overreaching, but protocol triggers at >10% decline

markers_to_watch.threshold: Run #10 avg HR must be ≤135 bpm (Run #9 was 142 — 7 bpm over target)
markers_to_watch.reason: Cardiac drift at current effort levels suggests either pace too aggressive or insufficient recovery between runs

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain lasting >24h after Run #9 triggers skip of Run #10
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance bottleneck at 102.6 kg body weight; Run #9 suffer score was the highest of the comeback (34)
